understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to maneuver selectable pieces onto all goal tiles (+) simultaneously in each level of the grid-based puzzle to achieve a WIN condition and progress through all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece (P) by 3 pixels per cell in the chosen direction unless blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; pushable blocks (B) can be pushed if adjacent; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at exact pixel coordinates like [15,21]; multiple pieces must occupy all goals at once to win, with a finite step budget per level.
